instruction: Rewrite the content to meet insurance regulatory and compliance standards.

input.draft_text:
NRI Day - How Buying Term Insurance Benefits NRIs
Life is uncertain. When life throws unexpected curveballs, consequences can be worst, and all we can do is only be prepared for it. This is when life insurance comes into the picture. Term life insurance is a pure protection plan that acts like a financial shield to your loved ones against life’s uncertainties. During an unfortunate event like death, your loved ones are secured financially with the large sum assured (life insurance coverage) chosen by you at the time of purchasing the policy. This can help your family maintain financial stability even when you are not around. Term insurance plans can be availed by all Indian citizens. Foreign Exchange Management Act of 1999, allows Non-resident Indians (NRIs) and Persons of Indian Origin (PIOs) to buy term insurance plans offered by life insurance companies in India. This NRI day, secure your family and loved ones financially by availing of the term life insurance plans available online for NRIs.
About NRI Day1
Pravasi Bharatiya Divas, which is also known as Non-Resident Indian (NRI) day, is also celebrated in India on the 9th of January every two years. The significance of this celebration is to strengthen the overseas Indian community’s engagement with the Government of India in order to contribute to the country’s development and to connect with their roots. The day has its roots back to the Indian freedom movement led by the Father of the Nation, Mahatma Gandhiji, who returned from South Africa in 1915.
Term Insurance for NRIs:
If you are a non-resident Indian staying in a foreign land away from your family, celebrate your day by availing of the term life insurance plan online to shield your loved ones. Though NRIs can avail the life insurance coverage in the country of their residence, it comes with a lengthy process. There are many insurance companies that offer term insurance plans for NRIs in India on the digital platform. There is no need for NRIs to be present in India to purchase the term insurance policy. Term insurance can be purchased online from anywhere. Insurance companies issue online term insurance policies without any pre-medical tests. If need be, many insurance companies conduct telemedical examinations. Premium may also vary based on various factors, including the risk factor in the country of residence. Let us first look at the features of the term insurance plan for NRIs.
Features of Term Insurance Plan for NRIs:
The following are the features of term insurance for NRIs
Quick and convenient:
You need to keep scan copies of your important documents like age proof, income proof, and passport ready to start the online buying process. All you need to do is fill up the online proposal form with all the relevant information, upload all the necessary documents and make the premium payment to complete the process. Buying term insurance online in India is that simple and quick for NRIs to secure their loved one’s financial future.
Customisable amount of cover:
When you are buying a term insurance plan, it is important to buy the right, and adequate coverage ensures financial stability for your family even when you are not around. NRIs can avail of term insurance coverage starting from a sum assured of INR 2 lakhs to INR 5 Crs. Some of the term insurance plans offered by some well-known insurance companies do not come with an upper limit. The amount of sum assured can be chosen as per your insurance needs.
Flexibility:
Any NRI above 18 years of age can opt for a term insurance plan online. The coverage can be availed for up to 65 years, depending on the terms and conditions of the insurance company. Some of the insurance companies offer whole life cover on term insurance plans availed by NRIs. You get the flexibility to choose the policy term based on your insurance need varying from 6 months to 25 years and more.
Easy payment options:
To buy term insurance plans online, NRIs can use bank internet payment options. You can pay through NRO, NRE, or FCNR account at a frequency chosen by you. NRO account can be used if the coverage is bought by making payments in Indian currency. NRE or FCNR account, or SWIFT remittance can be used if the payment is in foreign currency.
The Benefits of Buying Term Insurance for NRIs
The following are the main benefits of term insurance for NRIs:
Financial stability
The main benefit offered by the term insurance policy is the protection against the eventualities that ensure the financial stability of your loved ones even when you are not around in this world. The lump sum benefit offered by the term insurance policy during an unfortunate event to the beneficiary can be utilised to pay out the outstanding debt and day-to-day expenses and meet family members' goals.
Customisation
The term insurance policy offered by the insurance companies for NRIs comes with many riders, such as critical illness rider, accidental death benefit, income rider, accidental disability rider, etc., which can be chosen based on the requirement to enhance the coverage. Customisation benefit ensures you get the tailor-made cover.
Flexibility to choose the payout:
Many term insurance policies come with varying payout options, such as lump sum payout or payout in instalments or a combination of both. You can choose the payout as convenient for your loved ones depending on the family’s needs.
Tax benefit
The premium that you pay towards term insurance coverage qualifies for tax deduction under Section 80C of the Income Tax Act, 1961. There are also tax exemptions that can be availed under Section 10 (10D) of the Income Tax Act, 1961, on the payout2.
Term insurance policy offers many benefits, and thus, NRIs should avail adequate term insurance coverage to secure their family’s future dreams.
Disclaimer:
The views stated in this article are not to be construed as investment advice and readers are suggested to seek independent financial advice before making any investment decisions. For more details on risk factors, terms and conditions please read the sales brochure & policy document (available on www.bajajallianzlife.com) carefully before concluding a sale. Bajaj Allianz Life Insurance Company Ltd., Regd. office Address: Bajaj Allianz House, Airport Road, Yerawada, Pune - 411006, Reg. No.: 116, CIN: U66010PN2001PLC015959, Call us on toll free No.: 1800 209 7272, Mail us: customercare@bajajallianz.co.in, Fax No: 02066026789
Ref:
Pravasi Bharatiya Divas - Wikipedia
Tax Laws & Rules > Acts > Income-tax Act, 1961 (incometaxindia.gov.in)
